response.original_title: How to Get a SAS Refund Easily [Best Results]
response.overview: SAS Airlines refunds can be requested online via My Trips for eligible,📞+1 (866)-450-7394(USA/CANADA) OR 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] [UK]  unused tickets booked directly, with a 24-hour free cancellation policy for most bookings. If SAS cancels the flight,📞+1 (866)-450-7394(USA/CANADA) OR 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] [UK]  passengers can rebook or request a full refund. For delays or cancellation compensation (up to €600 under EU261), claims should be submitted via the official SAS claim form.  📞+1 (866)-450-7394(USA/CANADA) OR 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] [UK] or MX(+52-800-351-0319 or AU+611-(800)-956 -584}
